goal: A distributive contest with a genuine winner: constant-sum payoffs (no Pareto-dominant attractor) where several BATNA-clearing deals each hand a different faction the largest share, so a stronger negotiator claims more. Must NOT contain a behavioral focal point (an 'everyone-takes-their-own-priority' deal that clears all BATNAs) or exact-tie equal-split deals, since either collapses the contest into seat-determined coordination.
